title: Code of Conduct and Workplace Behavior Expectations
text:
Q: What are the expectations for my behavior at work?
A: Our company expects all employees to adhere to a professional code of conduct that promotes a respectful and inclusive workplace. Employees should treat colleagues, clients, and visitors with courtesy and respect, avoiding any form of harassment or discrimination. Punctuality and reliability are also essential; employees are expected to arrive on time and notify their supervisor at least one hour in advance if they will be late or absent. Additionally, employees must maintain confidentiality regarding sensitive company information and adhere to all safety protocols. Violations of these expectations can result in disciplinary action, which may include verbal warnings, written warnings, or termination, depending on the severity of the offense. If you have questions about specific behaviors or need to report an issue, please contact your HR representative within 24 hours of the incident.
